# Feature Request

## Summary

Briefly describe the feature you would like to add.

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you think it should work.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any other approaches?

## Use Case

Who would use this feature and why?

## Additional Context

Add screenshots, examples, links, or any extra details here.
